  "claims": [
    "Approximately 13 million Americans become infected with HPV each year.",
    "HPV is a leading cause of cervical cancer, which is one of the most preventable cancers.",
    "A vaccine exists to protect against infection from HPV.",
    "Since the HPV vaccination has been in use, HPV infections and cervical pre-cancers have dropped significantly.",
